meaning: n.移动,轮班,移位,变化,办法,手段vt.替换,转移,改变,移转,推卸,变速vi.转换,移动,转变,推托,变速
examples: We need to shift the focus of this debate.
The Green Party is attempting to shift the American consciousness.
Could you help me shift some furniture?
Berman started at ABC News as a desk assistant working the overnight shift in 1995.
What has buoyed the premium oyster business is a historic shift in the habits of oyster eaters.
